_meta.formula: (((Base + BuffWeaponDmg) * Combo * Zone + GearWeaponDmg) * (1 + PowerBonus) + AdditionalDmg) * (1 + HitLocationBonus) * (1 - DR * (1 + DRMod) * (1 - Pen)) + TrueDmg
_meta.penetration_rule: effective DR = target DR * (1 - attacker penetration); pen can only help the attacker (floor at unmodified 1-DR)
_meta.notes: AoE and DoT sources ignore zone multipliers. Race bonus/reduction and projectile falloff are not modeled yet.
